name: saeed
description: SAEED (سعيد) — Self-Advancing Elite Engineering Directorate. A self-improving team of 46 specialist Claude Code subagents spanning architecture, frontend, backend, databases, AI/RAG, security, DevOps, design, QA, and bilingual (Arabic/English) delivery — with a micro-managing boss, a continuous-improvement loop, and the ability to upgrade its own models and roster.
